interfaces.name: getPrimaryNavCategories
interfaces.description: Get top-level categories to display in the primary navigation (e.g., sightseeing, dinner_cruises, sunset_evening, family_friendly, private_charters, gift_cards).

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including hero section, featured categories, featured cruises, popular cruises, and highlighted offers.

interfaces.name: getActivePromotions
interfaces.description: Get currently active promotional codes and offers (e.g., SUMMER10) to display on the home or checkout pages.

interfaces.name: getDepartureLocations
interfaces.description: Get list of departure locations (piers) for use in quick search, filters, and contact/map sections.

parameters.name: onlyPrimary
parameters.description: If true, only return primary departure points.

interfaces.name: getCruiseTourFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options (time of day, features, price ranges, durations, group sizes, days of week, months, departure locations) for cruise and tour listing or search pages.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional category context (e.g., sightseeing, dinner_cruises). Usually derived from the page URL.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Optional context hint, e.g., 'category_listing', 'search_results', 'private_charters'.

interfaces.name: searchCruiseTours
interfaces.description: Search and list cruises, tours, and private charters with support for category, date range, time-of-day, duration, price, features, group size, departure location, and sorting. Used for both category listing pages and search results (e.g., Old Town Pier, private weekend charters).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query, e.g., 'Old Town Pier'.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional category filter, e.g., sightseeing, dinner_cruises, sunset_evening.

parameters.name: departureLocationId
parameters.description: Optional departure location filter (e.g., Old Town Pier).

parameters.name: specificDate
parameters.description: Specific date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., for one Friday in June.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Start of date range in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., today.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: End of date range in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., 7 days from today.

parameters.name: daysOfWeek
parameters.description: Optional list of days of week to include, e.g., ['friday'], ['saturday','sunday'].

parameters.name: timeOfDay
parameters.description: Time-of-day tags to filter by, e.g., ['morning','afternoon','evening','sunset'].

parameters.name: departureTimeAfter
parameters.description: Only include departures at or after this time (HH:mm), e.g., '17:00' for evening charters.

parameters.name: departureTimeBefore
parameters.description: Only include departures at or before this time (HH:mm), e.g., '14:00' for pre-2pm lunch cruises.

parameters.name: minPriceAdult
parameters.description: Minimum price per adult ticket, e.g., 30.

parameters.name: maxPriceAdult
parameters.description: Maximum price per adult ticket, e.g., 40 or 75.

parameters.name: minTotalBudget
parameters.description: Minimum estimated total budget for the booking (used mainly for charters).

parameters.name: maxTotalBudget
parameters.description: Maximum estimated total budget for the booking (e.g., 900 for a charter).

parameters.name: minDurationMinutes
parameters.description: Minimum duration in minutes, e.g., 150 for at least 2.5 hours.

parameters.name: maxDurationMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum duration in minutes, e.g., 90 for 60–90 minute tours.

parameters.name: minGroupSize
parameters.description: Minimum group size capacity, e.g., 10 for private charters.

parameters.name: maxGroupSize
parameters.description: Maximum group size capacity.

parameters.name: features
parameters.description: Feature tags to require, e.g., ['lunch_included','drinks_included','live_music','audio_guide','free_cancellation'].

parameters.name: productType
parameters.description: Optional filter for 'shared_cruise' or 'private_charter'.

parameters.name: pricingModel
parameters.description: Optional filter for 'per_person' or 'per_charter'.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort mode, e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'rating_desc', 'duration_desc', 'departure_time_asc'.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of results per page.

interfaces.name: getCruiseTourDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific cruise, tour, or private charter to display on the product detail page.

parameters.name: cruiseTourId
parameters.description: ID of the cruise or tour, typically derived from the page URL.

interfaces.name: getCruiseTourAvailability
interfaces.description: Get date and time-slot availability for a specific cruise or charter between two dates to drive the calendar and time pickers.

parameters.name: cruiseTourId
parameters.description: Cruise or tour to check availability for.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Start date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: End date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: daysOfWeek
parameters.description: Optionally restrict to certain days, e.g., ['saturday','sunday'] for weekend charters.

parameters.name: timeOfDay
parameters.description: Optionally restrict to time-of-day tags, e.g., ['evening','sunset'].

interfaces.name: getCruiseTourExtrasOptions
interfaces.description: Get optional extras available for a specific cruise or charter (e.g., drinks packages, onboard meals) to show as selectable add-ons.

parameters.name: cruiseTourId
parameters.description: Cruise or tour whose extras should be listed.

interfaces.name: getCruiseTourPricingPreview
interfaces.description: Calculate a live price preview for a configured cruise or charter (date, time, passengers, and extras) before adding it to the cart.

parameters.name: cruiseTourId
parameters.description: Cruise or tour being priced.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Selected departure date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: timeSlotId
parameters.description: Selected time slot ID. If omitted, the default time slot for the chosen date is used where applicable.

parameters.name: adultCount
parameters.description: Number of adults.

parameters.name: childCount
parameters.description: Number of children.

parameters.name: seniorCount
parameters.description: Number of seniors.

parameters.name: guestCount
parameters.description: Total guests for private charters when pricing per charter.

parameters.name: selectedExtras
parameters.description: IDs of selected optional extras from getCruiseTourExtrasOptions.

interfaces.name: addTourBookingToCart
interfaces.description: Add a configured shared cruise or private charter booking to the single-user cart, creating the cart if needed and returning the updated cart overview.

parameters.name: cruiseTourId
parameters.description: Cruise or tour to add to the cart.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Selected departure date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: timeSlotId
parameters.description: Selected time slot ID for the departure.

parameters.name: adultCount
parameters.description: Number of adults.

parameters.name: childCount
parameters.description: Number of children.

parameters.name: seniorCount
parameters.description: Number of seniors.

parameters.name: guestCount
parameters.description: Total guests for private charters.

parameters.name: selectedExtras
parameters.description: IDs of selected extras from getCruiseTourExtrasOptions.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes such as charter requests or internal comments.

interfaces.name: getGiftCardTemplates
interfaces.description: Get available gift card templates and configuration options (fixed amounts, custom amount ranges, default applicability).

interfaces.name: addGiftCardToCart
interfaces.description: Configure a gift card (amount, scope, recipient/sender details, message, delivery method), create a GiftCardItem, add it to the cart, and return the updated cart overview.

parameters.name: templateId
parameters.description: Optional gift card template to base this gift card on.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Gift card amount, e.g., 150.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency code, e.g., 'USD'.

parameters.name: appliesToScope
parameters.description: Where the gift card can be used, e.g., 'all_cruises', 'any_tour', 'specific_category', 'specific_product'.

parameters.name: applicableCategoryIds
parameters.description: When scope is 'specific_category', IDs of categories this gift card can be used on.

parameters.name: applicableProductIds
parameters.description: When scope is 'specific_product', IDs of cruises/tours this gift card can be used on.

parameters.name: recipient_name
parameters.description: Name of the recipient, e.g., 'Alex Rivera'.

parameters.name: recipient_email
parameters.description: Email of the recipient for email delivery.

parameters.name: sender_name
parameters.description: Name of the sender, e.g., 'Jordan Lee'.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Personalized message to include with the gift card.

parameters.name: delivery_method
parameters.description: Delivery method, e.g., 'email', 'print_at_home', 'physical_mail'.

interfaces.name: getCartOverview
interfaces.description: Get the current single-user cart with all items (tours, charters, gift cards), including dates, times, passenger counts, and price totals. Used as the booking summary page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemBookingDetails
interfaces.description: Update the configuration of a cart item (date, time, passenger counts, extras, notes) and recalculate totals.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: Cart item to update.

date.description: Updated departure date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD).

guestCount.description: Updated total guest count for charters.

selectedExtras.description: Updated list of selected extra IDs.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart overview.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the cart item to remove.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a full summary of the current cart for the checkout page, including all items, totals, and any applied promotion.

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCart
interfaces.description: Apply or update a promotional code (e.g., SUMMER10) to the current cart and return updated totals while staying on the checkout page.

parameters.name: promoCode
parameters.description: Promotional code string, e.g., 'SUMMER10'.

interfaces.name: submitCheckout
interfaces.description: Finalize the purchase/booking for all items in the cart by collecting contact and payment details, creating a BookingOrder and BookingItems.

parameters.name: contact_name
parameters.description: Primary contact full name.

parameters.name: contact_email
parameters.description: Primary contact email address.

parameters.name: contact_phone
parameters.description: Primary contact phone number.

parameters.name: billing_address
parameters.description: Billing address for the payment method.

payment_token.description: Opaque token from the payment provider.

card_last4.description: Last 4 digits of card, if method_type is 'card'.

parameters.name: accept_terms
parameters.description: Indicates the user has accepted the terms and cancellation policies.

interfaces.name: getBookingConfirmation
interfaces.description: Retrieve booking confirmation details for a completed order to display on the confirmation page.

parameters.name: referenceCode
parameters.description: Human-friendly booking reference code from the URL or post-checkout redirect.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get the content for the About Us page, including history, mission, safety standards, fleet info, and testimonials.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get contact details and map information for the Contact page, including phone, email, office address, and main departure points.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit an enquiry from the Contact page (general questions, private charter enquiries, or booking support).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Sender's name.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Sender's email address.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Sender's phone number.

parameters.name: enquiry_type
parameters.description: Type of enquiry, e.g., 'general', 'private_charter', 'booking_support'.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject line for the enquiry.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Main message body.

parameters.name: preferred_contact_method
parameters.description: Preferred contact method, e.g., 'email' or 'phone'.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get FAQ entries covering schedules, inclusions, accessibility, booking, modification, cancellation, and gift card usage.

interfaces.name: getTermsAndConditionsContent
interfaces.description: Get the Terms & Conditions content for display and linking from checkout and other pages.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the Privacy Policy content explaining data collection, use, storage, and user rights.

interfaces.name: getCancellationPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the Cancellation Policy content explaining conditions for free cancellation, refund processes, and fees.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user cart in storage and ensure monetary fields are initialized.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, discount, and total amounts after any change to cart items or promotion.

helperFunctions.name: _validateAndApplyPromoCode
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate a promo code against PromoCode rules and apply the appropriate discounts to the current cart.
